svg.title: AXIS sink: 4 × 32-bit beats → 128-bit word, routed by DEST
svg.desc: Four 32-bit AXIS beats are assembled into a 128-bit staging register via a beat counter. On completion, the DEST decoder routes the word to weight_sram, input_buffer, or bias_sram.
svg.text: AXIS sink: 4 × 32-bit beats -->1 row × 128-bit, routed by DEST
